Paid campaign recommendation.

B2B workflow automation platform is the product. Mid-market SaaS operations teams is the market.

The locale is GB. Markets include Ireland and United Kingdom. Verticals include Software and Professional services. Company sizes are 1000+.

Titles are Revenue Operations Manager and Marketing Operations Director. Functions are Marketing, Sales, and Operations. Seniority is Director and VP.

Search terms are workflow automation and revenue operations. Problems are manual handoffs and slow lead follow-up. Buying triggers are CRM migration and pipeline conversion pressure.

Goal is Trial demand. Channels are linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
